overall.description: A cinematic gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character exploring a dark, neon-lit night market alley. The camera follows a figure through steam-filled streets, enters a fluorescent-lit diner with patrons at the counter, and exits to view a large street billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered night market alley with steam vents

agents.ego_description: following a person with purple hair and a hat through a steam-filled alleyway

notable_agents.action: person with purple hair and blue hat walking ahead through steam

entered.detail: cluster of red spherical paper lanterns hanging overhead
yellow neon sign with stylized text reading Lizzie's
thick white steam or fog drifting across the alley
metal tables and equipment along the right wall
exposed metal piping and ductwork on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow, steam-filled alley at night, illuminated by red paper lanterns and neon signs. The camera follows a character with purple hair through the misty corridor, passing market stalls and industrial piping overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from alley to diner entrance

events.description: entering the diner from the alley, lighting shifts from neon to fluorescent

agents.ego_description: turning left and walking into a diner with a long metal counter

notable_agents.action: muscular man in suspenders sitting at the counter reading a newspaper

entered.detail: glass doorway leading into the diner with fluorescent lighting visible inside
long stainless steel counter with stools
bright white fluorescent light fixtures on the ceiling
illuminated menu board behind the counter
large glass window looking out to the alley

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left and enters a diner, transitioning from the neon-lit alley to fluorescent interior lighting. A muscular man sits at the stainless steel counter reading a newspaper as the camera approaches the serving area.

agents.ego_description: moving along the diner counter past seated patrons and a vendor

notable_agents.action: muscular man with suspenders reading a newspaper at the counter
vendor standing behind the counter with arms crossed

entered.detail: stack of newspapers and magazines on the counter
television screen mounted on the wall behind the counter

segments.scene_description: Inside the fluorescent-lit diner, the camera moves along the stainless steel counter past a muscular man reading a newspaper and a vendor standing behind the serving area. The space is narrow with shelves of bottles visible behind the counter.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley with large billboard and ventilation fan

events.description: exiting the diner back into the neon-lit alley

agents.ego_description: leaving the diner and approaching a large illuminated street billboard

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with pink text reading WATSON WHORE and images below
massive industrial circular ventilation fan with metal grating
stacked metal crates and boxes on the right side
scattered trash and debris on the alley floor

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the diner back into the alley, revealing a large pink neon billboard for WATSON WHORE beneath a massive circular ventilation fan. The area is littered with debris and metal crates, with distant neon signs visible down the alley.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a moody, steam-filled night market alley into a sterile diner before returning to the neon-lit street. It begins by trailing a purple-haired character through a misty corridor illuminated by red paper lanterns and overhead industrial piping. As the camera turns left, the atmosphere shifts from the red glow of the alley to the harsh fluorescent lighting of a diner, gliding past a muscular man reading a newspaper at a stainless steel counter. The scene then moves along the narrow serving area and shelves of bottles before exiting the establishment back into the night air. Finally, the view opens up to reveal a large pink neon billboard beneath a massive circular ventilation fan amidst a landscape of debris and distant city lights.
